phase3_findings.description: Fix-introduced self-contradicting legend: phantom 'actions_missing (cont.) → +1' bullet made the legend enumerate 8 while fixture/assert produce 7.

Documented falsehood: header claimed no recognized-family endpoint falls in the un-walked-helper gap, but post-issue-comment.sh (invoked as $V/... in claude job) makes a literal comments call, un-attributed.
Empty/deny-all permissions block treated as inherit-top-level (fail-open), reachable via canonical YAML, undocumented; not live.

fix_decisions.claim_text: post-issue-comment.sh comments call un-attributed + documented falsehood
fix_decisions.evidence: Verified: post-issue-comment.sh invoked as $V/... in devflow-implement.yml:783 (missed by scripts/<name>.sh sweep), makes literal comments call. Replaced hardcoded 2-helper attribution with GENERAL dynamic attribution (walk every .sh basename a job invokes); verified clean tree stays 0 (all 3 helper-invoking jobs grant their families) and monotonic-safe (union only adds requirements).

Over-grade/symmetric calibration: verified real (empty block emits no JOBPERM → inherits top-level → fail-open when top-level grants the family) but NOT live (all devflow jobs use populated blocks); robust fix must distinguish deny-all/grant-all/read-all (false-positive risk). Elevation was driven by being undocumented — resolved by disclosing it as a bounded deferred limitation (symmetric with the accepted indentation deferral). Disclosure is the finding's own stated minimum.

phase3_findings.description: Generic helper-attribution mechanism not differentially tested vs a hardcoded-list regression (all fixture helpers are real).
Misattributed collaborators call to resolve-implement-trigger.sh (actually in sourced authorize-actor.sh); sourced-helper limitation undisclosed.
Single-level attribution (transitive/sourced helpers not walked); basename must appear literally. Not live.
